name: M.B.A
description: M.B.A (Maple Bear Apocalypse) - Minecraft Bedrock Edition Addon

scripts.validate:json: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');let ok=0,fail=0;const walk=(d)=>{for(const e of fs.readdirSync(d,{withFileTypes:true})){const p=path.join(d,e.name);if(e.isDirectory())walk(p);else if(e.name.endsWith('.json')){try{JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'));ok++}catch(err){console.error(p+': '+err.message);fail++}}}};walk('BP');walk('BP - Dev');walk('RP');walk('RP - Dev');console.log(ok+' JSON files valid, '+fail+' failed');if(fail)process.exit(1)"
scripts.validate: npm run validate:json && npm run validate:syntax
scripts.check: npm run validate && npm run lint

author: Litbolt123 and Compoohter
